raw.blind:description:en: We have prepared a tactile and audio guide to Švicarija for blind and partially-sighted visitors. There are two tactile maps available at Tivoli Mansion to help you find your way around the building.
raw.blind:description:si: Za slepe in slabovidne obiskovalce smo pripravili tipni in zvočni vodnik po Švicariji. V Gradu Tivoli sta za orientacijo po stavbi na voljo dva tipna zemljevida.
raw.deaf:description:en: On prior arrangement, we offer tailor-made guided tours of exhibitions, guided tours with sign language interpreters and workshops based on the content of temporary exhibitions.
raw.deaf:description:si: Po predhodnem dogovoru izvajamo prilagojena vodstva po razstavah, vodstva s tolmači za znakovni jezik in delavnice z vsebinskimi izhodišči občasnih razstav.
raw.fee:conditional: no @ children under 12, members, journalists, unemployed, people with disabilities
raw.name: MGLC Švicarija
raw.wheelchair:description:en: Tivoli Mansion is wheelchair accessible. The Švicarija building has a lift and adapted toilets. Before visiting, please call our Info Point for assistance on the following number: +386 1 241 38 12.
raw.wheelchair:description:si: Grad Tivoli je z dvigalom dostopen obiskovalcem na invalidskih vozičkih. Stavba Švicarije ima dvigalo in prilagojene sanitarije. Prosimo, da pred obiskom za asistenco pokličete našo Info točko: 01 241 38 12.
